fareValidation: Total must equal sum of components
passengerValidation: Age must be valid for discount category
Weight must not exceed 120kg per passenger
Infants must be accompanied by adult
temporalValidation: Booking must be within validity period

pricingRules: Round-trip discount: 10% for return within 7 days
Early bird: 15% for booking 30+ days in advance
Last minute: 20% surcharge for booking <24 hours
modificationRules: Leg modification allowed up to 24 hours before departure
Fare difference applies for upgraded routes
No fee for date changes within same route
cancellationRules: Full refund if cancelled >48 hours before departure
No refund if cancelled <24 hours before
